name: Adversarial Pre-PR Review Gate (gate-loop)
description_en: A Claude Code workflow that runs a maker≠checker pre-PR gate: it fans out read-only auditor subagents in parallel over a committed diff, re-dispatches only the failures, applies bounded fix rounds, stops on non-convergence, and keeps every verdict verbatim for posting to the PR.
description_zh: 一个执行「制作者≠审查者」预 PR 门禁的 Claude Code 工作流：对已提交的 diff 并行派发只读审查子代理，仅对失败项重新派发，跑有上限的修复轮次，遇到不收敛即停止，并逐字保留每条裁定以便贴回 PR。
long_en: Implements §7 of a larger "tethered-autonomy" harness (Creance): given a taskId and strong/cheap model tiers resolved from .claude/MODELS.md, it dispatches a reviewer roster (spec-auditor, constitution-auditor, plus conditional contract- and spec-quality-auditors) against `git diff main..HEAD`, collects PASS/JUSTIFY/FAIL verdicts under a strict schema, and on FAIL has a maker-role agent commit minimal scoped fixes before re-auditing only the failing reviewers. It carries a verbatim telemetry payload and handles isolated-workspace (gate-in-place) vs. shared-tree review modes, restoring the task branch before each fix round.
long_zh: 实现了更大型「拴绳自治」框架（Creance）的第 7 节：给定 taskId 与从 .claude/MODELS.md 解析出的强/廉价模型档位，针对 `git diff main..HEAD` 派发审查者名单（spec-auditor、constitution-auditor，以及按条件加入的 contract- 与 spec-quality-auditor），按严格 schema 收集 PASS/JUSTIFY/FAIL 裁定；遇 FAIL 则由制作者角色代理提交最小范围修复，再只对失败的审查者重审。它携带逐字遥测载荷，区分隔离工作区（就地门禁）与共享工作树两种评审模式，并在每轮修复前恢复任务分支。
sec_note_en: A Claude Code Agent Workflow (.js) and only one stage of a larger harness — not standalone. It requires args {taskId, strongModel, cheapModel} and named auditor subagent types (spec-auditor, constitution-auditor, etc.) that live in the source repo; without that surrounding .claude/ setup it will not run. The reviewer subagents hold Bash (they run git read commands) and the fix-round agent commits code to the task branch. It assumes work is already committed and audits the committed diff.
sec_note_zh: 这是 Claude Code Agent Workflow（.js），且只是更大框架中的一个阶段，并非独立可用。它要求传入 args {taskId, strongModel, cheapModel}，并依赖源仓库中具名的审查子代理类型（spec-auditor、constitution-auditor 等）；缺少周边 .claude/ 配置便无法运行。审查子代理持有 Bash（执行 git 只读命令），修复轮的代理会向任务分支提交代码。它假定工作已提交，并审查已提交的 diff。
